criteria.name: Uses sequence diagram syntax
criteria.description: Uses Mermaid sequenceDiagram syntax rather than a flowchart, class diagram, or ER diagram.

criteria.name: Includes all participants
criteria.description: Includes Browser, WebApp, AuthService, and UserStore as participants or clearly equivalent actor names.

criteria.name: Orders the happy path correctly
criteria.description: Shows credentials sent from Browser to WebApp, verification through AuthService and UserStore, and a successful dashboard/session response.

criteria.name: Models failure branch
criteria.description: Uses an alt/else-style branch for valid versus invalid credentials and returns an error on the invalid path.

criteria.name: Explains type choice briefly
criteria.description: Includes one concise sentence explaining that the diagram fits ordered interactions over time.
